identity.name: House of Kitchens
design_principles: Appetite First: Food photos must be large, high-quality, and the hero of every screen.
Playful Geometry: Use rounded corners, pill shapes, and soft blobs to feel friendly.
Clear Status: Chef availability (Online/Offline) must be instantly visible.
Community Vibe: Highlight chef stories and faces, not just food items.

headings.usage: Main headings, section titles, chef names

primary.name: Zest Orange
primary.usage: Primary buttons, CTAs, active states, price tags

secondary.name: Fresh Mint
secondary.usage: Success states, vegetarian indicators, secondary buttons

marketing_hero.description: Asymmetrical grid showcasing happy chefs, raw ingredients, and final dishes.

food_feed.description: Large cards with full-width images. Price and Chef face floating on top of image.

chef_dashboard.description: High information density but with 'air' between sections. Use cards for metrics.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B35] hover:bg-[#E85D2A] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-[#FF6B35] text-[#FF6B35] hover:bg-[#FFF5F0] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-all

cards.food_item: bg-white rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all group cursor-pointer border border-gray-100
cards.chef_profile: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 flex flex-col items-center text-center

inputs.default: bg-gray-50 border-transparent focus:border-[#FF6B35] focus:bg-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 transition-all outline-none ring-0 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF6B35]/20

badges.status: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

hero_collage.alt: Happy home chef cooking in blue kitchen

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings. Use 'Fredoka'.
Do not use dark mode by default. Food looks best on white/light backgrounds.
Buttons must be pill-shaped (rounded-full) to match the playful theme.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'lucide-react', 'framer-motion', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge' if not present. 2. Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the custom colors and fonts. 3. Create a 'Layout' component that handles the navigation and footer. 4. Use the provided image URLs for the landing page and dummy data. 5. Implement the 'Chef Availability' toggle as a prominent UI element in the Chef Dashboard.
